text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm able to get my weight back up before the
Japanese Oaks! Unfortunately, I wasn't able to
complete Trainer's ideal training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about how I'll perform, but Trainer
tells me to just do my best and not to leave any
regrets behind. I'm going to run my heart out
today!
